title: Adult Campus Classroom Story Still AI
sourceTitle: Adult Campus Classroom Story Still AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: adult university student in white shirt and navy tie, focused on workbook by the window is the adult university student subject, keeping a clean natural face, white shirt and navy tie styling when supplied, restrained youthful expression, and realistic classroom behavior. Scene: sunlit classroom desk with books, pencil case and water cup, cinematic study moment provides the window-side classroom desk, workbook, pencil case, water cup, soft classmates in the background, and quiet student-life context. Composition: Fixed candid classroom film-still composition: vertical 9:16, student seated by the window at a desk, workbook and small objects visible, face lit by sunlight, classmates softly blurred, and the captured moment feels like a natural pause between studying and noticing the camera. Signature Elements: Focused workbook moment, slight interruption, shy small smile, hand near mouth or pen pause, window-side sunlight, blurred classmates, desk objects, and restrained natural emotion. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Warm sunlit classroom neutrals, white shirt, navy tie, pale desk paper, soft wood or beige classroom tones, gentle blue accents, and natural skin colors. Lighting: Natural window sunlight across the face and desk, soft classroom ambient fill, gentle paper highlights, and subtle background separation. Camera: Vertical candid close-to-mid classroom shot, realistic handheld feel, shallow depth, natural focus transition mood, and center-safe composition for mobile viewing. Materials: White school-style shirt fabric, navy tie, workbook paper, pen, pencil case, water cup glass or plastic, classroom desk surface, and soft hair detail. Restrictions: Use an adult university student only.
